Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Form And Special Interrogatories, Req. For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $320 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-17-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
